scripts.dev: concurrently -n fe,be -c cyan,green "cd frontend && npm run dev -- --port 7070" "WORKSPACES_ROOT=${WORKSPACES_ROOT:-/workspace} cd backend && npm run dev"
scripts.setup: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install && cd ../e2e && npm install
scripts.e2e:install: cd e2e && npm install && npx playwright install chromium
